chaos_ranked.title: New 7-Zip Vulnerability Could Let Crafted XZ Archives Run Code During Extraction
chaos_ranked.summary: Opening a crafted XZ archive in 7-Zip could let an attacker run code on the machine. The flaw, CVE-2026-14266, is a heap-based buffer overflow in how the archiver processes XZ chunked data, and Trend ...

chaos_ranked.summary:
